title: What a Difference a Day (or 2) Makes
excerpt: The day before Christmas, while crossing the 9th Street bridge, I snapped this photo. Today (the day after Christmas) this is what the same bridge looks like. And that my friends, is why our flight's been cancelled and we'll be…
body:
The day before Christmas, while crossing the 9th Street bridge, I snapped this photo.

Today (the day after Christmas) this is what the same bridge looks like.

And that my friends, is why our flight's been cancelled and we'll be staying in the snow for a couple more days.
